items.title: Review: Segway’s Navimow X430 robot mower is a highly advanced investment for automated lawn service
items.summary:
As the years go on, robots are getting more and more advanced and picking up various tasks across home cleaning, pet care, and lawn mowing, though it is fair to say that there is still room for plenty of growth. While we haven’t quite reached the pinnacle as represented in sci-fi media, we’re certainly getting there rather fast, and Segway’s Navimow X4 series robot lawn mowers are taking the lead as the current leader in the robot mowing race. With my parents in their retirement ages (despite not being able to retire yet), and my mother dealing with spinal disabilities over the last few years, in particular, what better time to test out a premium means to keep both medical accidents from occurring and the HOA off their backs?

Microsoft is rolling out some long-awaited changes to Windows Update to users on its Dev and Experimental Windows Insider channels, including the ability to indefinitely delay updates up to 35 days at a time. If you’re familiar with Cole Haan, you know they’ve really nailed that balance between comfort and style—everything feels well-made, modern, and easy to wear whether you’re dressing things up or keeping it casual. It’s one of those brands that consistently delivers a clean, polished look without sacrificing all-day comfort.

items.title: This 27-inch LG UltraGear gaming monitor lets you pick between 4K 180Hz and FHD 360Hz, and it’s down to $350 today
items.summary:
As part of its wider sale on gaming monitors, LG is offering its 27-inch UltraGear 4K UHD dual-mode gaming monitor for $349.99 shipped. This discounted price, which is also matched at Amazon, brings this display down from its $600 price tag, so you’re looking at a straight-up $250 discount on it today. It saw its biggest price drop during the holiday season last year when it hit the $300 mark, and it’s now within just $50 of that price. It’s a pretty good option to consider if you’re looking for a versatile display that can handle both immersive single-player titles and fast-paced competitive games, and you can learn more about it in detail below.
